node.statement: N1.5 (sgn INTERTWINES, pure algebra). sgn(S_F) j = j sgn(S_Phi), where sgn(S_F) := S_F R_F in A and sgn(S_Phi) := S_Phi R_Phi in B (GT-sgn-prop-P / def-spectral-idempotent: sgn(S)=S (S^2)^{-1/2}=S R). DERIVATION: sgn(S_F) j = (S_F R_F) j = S_F (R_F j) [associativity of composition, GT-hyp] = S_F (j R_Phi) [node 1.4: R_F j = j R_Phi] = (S_F j) R_Phi [associativity] = (j S_Phi) R_Phi [node 1.1: S_F j = j S_Phi] = j (S_Phi R_Phi) [associativity] = j sgn(S_Phi). Hence sgn(S_F) j = j sgn(S_Phi). Uses node 1.1, node 1.4, GT-sgn-prop-P, def-spectral-idempotent, GT-hyp.
